meta.title: Web Developer
meta.description: Freelance web developer, backend engineer & designer. Custom websites and applications by Vignes Ibrahim.

hero.bio: Web developer, backend & designer. Two and a half years of coding out of passion — and my first client recently. I turn your ideas into modern websites.

heroCube.dragHint: Drag or touch to rotate · theme follows the visible face
heroCube.themeHint: Theme switches with the cube's light / dark face
heroCube.ariaLabel: Interactive cube — light and dark faces

services.title: What I can
services.subtitle: From design to launch, clear solutions built for your business.

page.metaDescription: Website creation, design, backend, SEO and maintenance by {brand}. Clear solutions for your business.

web.title: Website creation
web.desc: Your showcase site or app, modern and easy to use. Fast, clear and built to turn visitors into clients.

backend.title: Systems & data
backend.desc: Everything behind the scenes: accounts, forms, data management. Reliable and ready to scale with you.

design.title: Custom design
design.desc: A visual identity that reflects you. Polished layouts and simple journeys that encourage contact.

mobile.title: All screen sizes
mobile.desc: Your site looks perfect on phone, tablet and desktop. Clients find you wherever they are.

seo.title: Visible on Google
seo.desc: Your site is optimized to be found on search engines. More visibility, more qualified leads.

maintenance.title: Support & maintenance
maintenance.desc: A site that stays fast and up to date. I'm available after launch to fix, improve and support you.

about.title: A trusted partner for your
about.p1: My name is {name}. Freelance web developer, backend engineer and designer — I've been coding for two and a half years out of passion: side projects, experiments and learning shaped my technical level.
about.p2: I recently supported my first client. Today I offer my services to build custom, clear and effective websites and applications.

page.metaDescription: Meet {brand}, freelance web developer: background, working method and support for your online presence.

step1.title: Discovery & scope
step1.desc: We take time to understand your business, goals and audience. Every project starts with a clear vision and shared priorities.

step2.title: Custom design
step2.desc: Mockups, visual approval then development: an elegant online presence aligned with your brand and built to convert.

step3.title: Launch & support
step3.desc: Go-live, final tests and post-launch follow-up. Your site stays fast, reliable and evolvable — with one point of contact throughout.

projects.title: My latest
projects.subtitle: A preview of my work — open a card to see details.

page.metaDescription: Explore {brand}'s work: showcase sites, e-commerce and custom web applications.
page.title: All my
page.subtitle: Filter by project type and click to see details.

nova.title: Nova — SaaS Dashboard
nova.desc: Analytics app concept: clear dashboard, charts and navigation designed for quick reading.

maison-belle.title: Maison Belle — E-commerce
maison-belle.desc: Online store mockup: catalog, product page and a simplified checkout flow.

atelier-lumiere.title: Atelier Lumière — Showcase
atelier-lumiere.desc: Showcase site for a creative studio: immersive gallery and integrated contact form.

fitpro.title: FitPro — Sports coaching
fitpro.desc: Coaching platform concept: landing page, programs and member area.

reviews.title: They trust
reviews.empty: Be the first to leave a review.
reviews.one: One review published — share yours after approval.

contact.title: Let's bring
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your idea. I'll reply within 48 hours with a clear proposal.
contact.name: Your name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project, goals and timeline...
contact.turnstileError: Complete the anti-spam check before sending.
contact.error: Could not send the message. Please try again.
contact.privacy: By submitting this form, you agree to be contacted by email.

reviewForm.title: Share your
reviewForm.subtitle: Worked with {name}? Leave a review. It will be published on the portfolio after approval.
reviewForm.name: Your name
reviewForm.messagePlaceholder: What did you appreciate? Describe your experience…
reviewForm.successBody: I'll publish it soon on the testimonials page.
reviewForm.consent: By submitting, you agree to publish your first name and review on this portfolio.
reviewForm.turnstileError: Complete the anti-spam check before sending.

validation.nameTooShortMin: Name is too short (2 characters minimum).
validation.messageTooShortMin: Message is too short (10 characters minimum).
validation.roleTooLong: Role or company name is too long.
validation.ratingRequired: Please choose a rating between 1 and 5 stars.
validation.cooldown: Please wait a few seconds before submitting again.
validation.mailTooLong: Message is too long to send by email. Please email me directly.
validation.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
validation.dailyRateLimited: Daily limit reached. Try again tomorrow or email me directly.
validation.reviewAlreadySubmitted: A review with this email is already pending or published. No need to send it again.
validation.reviewIpRateLimited: You’ve already sent today’s maximum reviews. Come back tomorrow to leave another one.
validation.checkFields: Please check the fields and try again.
validation.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
validation.turnstileFailed: Anti-spam verification failed. Please try again.
validation.sendFailed: Could not send right now. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: This page doesn't exist or has been moved.

legalPage.metaDescription: Legal notice and privacy policy for {brand}.
legalPage.title: Legal notice
legalPage.hostingText: This site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States.
legalPage.personalDataP1: The contact and review forms collect your name, email, and message only to respond to your request or publish a review with your consent. They are sent via <resend>Resend</resend> (a US-based provider) so I can be notified by email.
legalPage.personalDataP2: Resend processes this data on my behalf; see their <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.
legalPage.personalDataP3: Legal basis: performance of your request (contact) or consent (publishing a review). Retention period: as long as needed to process the request, then deletion upon request.
legalPage.personalDataP4: The review form uses <turnstile>Cloudflare Turnstile</turnstile> to limit spam. Turnstile may set a technical cookie; no personal data is shared for advertising purposes.
legalPage.personalDataP5: This data is never sold or transferred for commercial purposes, except where required by law.
legalPage.personalDataP6: To exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure), contact <email></email>.
legalPage.cookiesText: This site does not use advertising tracking cookies. Technical cookies may be set by the host (Vercel) or by Cloudflare Turnstile when submitting a review.

login.title: Admin sign-in
login.subtitle: Supabase auth · password + TOTP
login.configHint2: Add ADMIN_ALLOWED_EMAILS with your admin email.
login.configHint3: Enable TOTP MFA for this account in Supabase Auth.

mfa.stepHint: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.

enroll.step1Hint: Open Google Authenticator, Authy, or a compatible app, then scan this code.
enroll.step2Hint: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app.
enroll.codeInvalid: Enter the 6-digit code from the app.

password.title: Change password
password.policy: Re-authentication required · 12+ characters · upper, lower, number, symbol · sessions invalidated on success

logout.title: Confirm sign-out
logout.desc: You will leave the admin area. A new sign-in (password + MFA) will be required.

dashboard.title: Dashboard

stats.reviewsHint: Shown on the site (demo file if DB is missing)

dashboard.reviewsBody: Visitors can leave a review (email required). Each review starts as pending: you approve, withdraw, or delete.
dashboard.reviewsNext: Open the dedicated page to moderate incoming reviews.
dashboard.reviewsPendingBadge: {count, plural, one {# pending review} other {# pending reviews}}
dashboard.reviewsPublishedBadge: {count, plural, one {# published review} other {# published reviews}}
dashboard.reviewsPageSubtitle: Approve, withdraw from the site, or delete submitted reviews.
dashboard.aboutStatsBody: Edit the metrics shown on the site (years, clients, projects, response time). Labels stay translated via i18n.
dashboard.aboutStatsNext: Open the dedicated page to update figures without redeploying.
dashboard.aboutStatsPageSubtitle: These values power the stats grid on the home page.
dashboard.projectsBody: Add or edit work (FR/EN/AR titles, Supabase images, app type, personal/sold).
dashboard.projectsNext: Open the dedicated page to manage projects shown on the site.
dashboard.projectsPageSubtitle: Secure CRUD · Storage images · tech badges.
dashboard.settingsBody: Edit the email shown on the site and Discord, WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok links. Leave a network empty to hide it.
dashboard.settingsNext: Open settings to update without redeploying.
dashboard.settingsPageSubtitle: Public contact email and footer social links.
dashboard.contactBody: Contact forms are sent to {email} via Resend and stored in the secure inbox.
dashboard.contactNext: Open the dedicated page to read, archive, or delete messages.
dashboard.contactUnreadBadge: {count, plural, one {# unread message} other {# unread messages}}
dashboard.messagesPageSubtitle: Read, mark as read, archive, or delete incoming messages.
dashboard.demoBody: Projects and reviews on the site are samples. Replace them with real work and client feedback before production.

reviews.title: Review moderation
reviews.subtitle: Public submissions → pending → manual publication.
reviews.selectHint: Select a review to moderate it.
reviews.moderationHint: No automatic email verification: email is required, then you approve (anti-spam: Turnstile, honeypot, rate-limit).
reviews.notConfigured: Moderation disabled: add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and run npm run db:migrate (reviews table).

aboutStats.notConfiguredBody: Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and run npm run db:migrate (about_stats table).
aboutStats.formHint: Changes show up immediately on the About section.

validation.responseHours: Enter an integer between 0 and 720 hours.

socialLinks.notConfiguredBody: Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and run npm run db:migrate (site_social_links table).
socialLinks.formHint: Displayed email + social (https). Empty social field = hidden on site.

hints.contactEmail: Shown on the site (footer, contact, legal). Does not change Resend.
hints.discord: Invite or profile on discord.gg / discord.com

validation.discord: Invalid Discord HTTPS URL (discord.gg or discord.com).
validation.whatsapp: Invalid WhatsApp HTTPS URL (wa.me or whatsapp.com).

projects.notConfiguredBody: Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and run npm run db:migrate (projects table + portfolio-projects bucket).
projects.empty: No projects in the database. Create the first one.
projects.selectHint: Select a project or create a new one.
projects.localeHint: FR is required. Empty EN/AR are filled from FR on save.
projects.slugHint: Generated from the FR title. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.mfa_required: MFA authentication required for this action.
errors.mfa_invalid: Invalid or expired code. Try again.
errors.mfa_enroll_failed: Unable to generate the TOTP QR. Try again.
errors.mfa_already_enrolled: A TOTP factor is already active. Use the verification step.
errors.password_reauth_failed: Unable to change password. Check your current password.
errors.password_update_failed: Unable to save the new password. Try again shortly.
errors.password_weak: This password is too weak or compromised. Choose another.
errors.password_same: The new password must be different from the current one.
errors.account_locked: Account temporarily locked after too many failures. Try again later.
errors.cooldown: Please wait a few seconds before sending again.
errors.project_invalid_slug: Invalid slug (lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only).
errors.project_invalid_title: Title too short (fill at least FR).
errors.project_invalid_description: Description too short (min. 10 characters, at least in FR).
errors.project_invalid_images: Add at least one valid image.

inbox.title: Contact messages
inbox.subtitle: Secure inbox (Origin · MFA · service_role · RLS).
inbox.notConfigured: Inbox disabled: add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and run supabase/migrations/001_contact_messages.sql.
inbox.selectHint: Select a message to read it.
inbox.archiveFormHint: Add a follow-up note and the link to the email thread (Gmail, Outlook…).
inbox.archiveNotePlaceholder: e.g. Quote sent, waiting for reply…
